result.reasoning: Step 1 identified the Wikipedia page ID for "Australian Aboriginal Flag" as 7355. Step 2 retrieved 150 revisions between 2017-01-01 and 2019-01-31. Step 3 filtered these revisions for comments containing "vandalism" (case-insensitive) and found exactly 6 such edits. The answer is the count 6. No casing rule applied as the answer is numeric.
